pi_items.source: Verified from seed_library.py line 8-9 documentation: 'note = itemTypeID 28' and export_result.sh line 57 database query WHERE i.itemTypeID = 28. Confirmed against Zotero 7 schema. Note: README.md incorrectly states itemTypeID=1 for notes

privileged_info_summary: The task creates standalone research notes in Zotero 7.0.11. Metadata claims require two notes: Note 1 containing phrase 'Research Questions' with keywords transformer, attention, scalability (all verified as standard ML terms found in environment papers); Note 2 containing 'Key Findings' with pre-training, fine-tuning, benchmark (all verified in BERT literature). Both notes must be ≥100 characters and added to 'Dissertation Notes' collection. All keywords derive from real academic papers in the environment: BERT paper mentions pre-training, fine-tuning, and benchmarks; Attention is all you need paper introduces attention mechanisms; sample ML papers discuss transformer scalability. No synthetic data involved; the task generates new user-created notes via Zotero GUI. Database schema uses itemTypeID=28 for standalone notes in Zotero 7.
